data.title: Crypto could hit $28T by 2030 on Bitcoin, DeFi, tokenization: ARK
data.description:

data.title: White House Crypto Czar says banks and crypto will merge into one industry
data.description:
David Sacks said banks and crypto firms will merge into one digital asset industry once the market structure bill passes.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sacks-says-banks-and-crypto-will-merge/

data.title: Seeker (SKR) surged over 340% intraday, pushing its market capitalization above $600 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, Seeker (SKR), a native asset of the Solana Mobile ecosystem, saw its intraday increase exceed 340%, with its market value rapidly rising and once surpassing $600 million. It is currently trading at $560 million.

data.title: Central Banks Expected to Increase Gold Purchases by 2026
data.description: Central banks are projected to significantly increase their gold purchases by 2026. According to PANews, Goldman Sachs anticipates that as emerging market central banks continue to diversify their reserves away from other assets, the average annual gold purchase by central banks could reach 60 tons by 2026.

data.title: Crypto Prediction Market TVL Reaches Record High
data.description:
The total value locked (TVL) in crypto prediction markets has surpassed $550 million this week, setting a new record, according to ChainCatcher. This milestone exceeds the previous peak during the 2024 U.S. presidential election.

Polymarket leads with approximately $330 million in TVL, followed by OPINION with $155 million and Predict Fun with $21.7 million. However, in terms of trading volume, Kalshi, which primarily operates off-chain, tops the list with a weekly trading volume of $2.2 billion, including a record single-day volume of $535.5 million on January 18. Polymarket ranks third with a weekly trading volume of about $786 million.

Polymarket, which previously operated for free, has recently introduced a fee structure in some markets. On January 12, it recorded a single-day revenue of $109,300, which later decreased to below $75,000. Over the past seven days, Polymarket's revenue was approximately $550,000, second only to OPINION's $1.5 million. Kalshi estimates its fee revenue will exceed $263 million by 2025, primarily driven by the sports market.

data.title: SagaEVM Attack Leads to $7 Million in Crypto Theft
data.description:
SagaEVM suffers a $7 million hack on January 21, 2026, with efforts underway to address the breach.
source: https://coincu.com/news/sagaevm-7-million-crypto-theft/

data.title: Aggressive Trader Increases Short Positions in ETH, XRP, and XMR
data.description: On January 22, an aggressive trader known as '20 Million Band Hunter' has been increasing short positions in ETH, XRP, and XMR, according to HyperInsight monitoring. According to BlockBeats, within the past hour, the account has seen a floating profit of $12.33 million. This address is known for its aggressive trading style, utilizing high leverage for short-term operations, and has accumulated total profits of $107.9 million over its trading cycle.

data.title: Bithumb will list Seeker (SRK) against the Korean Won.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bithumb will list the Seeker (SRK) Korean Won pair.

data.title: Baidu Launches Wenxin Model 5.0 with Advanced Multimodal Capabilities
data.description: Baidu has officially launched the Wenxin Model 5.0, marking a significant advancement in its AI technology. According to PANews, this new generation model is built on native multimodal modeling technology, enabling comprehensive multimodal understanding and generation. The Wenxin Model 5.0 represents Baidu's latest efforts in enhancing AI capabilities, focusing on integrating various modes of data processing and interpretation.

data.title: U.S. Housing Policy Delays Senate's Crypto Legislation Review
data.description:
The U.S. Senate Banking Committee is set to prioritize housing legislation influenced by U.S. President Donald Trump's administration's push for affordable housing, according to PANews. This shift has led to the postponement of the anticipated review of the crypto market structure bill, which may now be delayed until late February or even March. Despite the Trump administration's public support for the crypto industry, housing costs remain a critical factor in U.S. inflation and electoral dynamics.

Meanwhile, the Agriculture Committee's version of the crypto bill was released on Wednesday and is scheduled for review on January 27. However, Democratic Senator Cory Booker has not endorsed the bill, indicating potential challenges in legislative integration moving forward.

data.title: U Power Completes $UCAR Token Issuance on BNB Chain
data.description: U Power, a Nasdaq-listed company, successfully issued $UCAR tokens on the BNB Chain through the RWA infrastructure platform PicWe on January 20, 2026. According to ChainCatcher, the issuance aims to support the ongoing construction of new energy infrastructure, expand operations, and upgrade the global business settlement system, enhancing the integration of real-world business with on-chain financial systems. U Power has announced that profits from its South European charging and swapping business will be shared with $UCAR holders. In addition to potential token appreciation, the annualized return on RWA equity alone could reach 17%. As of the time of reporting, the on-chain market capitalization of $UCAR tokens has exceeded $7 million, with the token price increasing by 68% within 12 hours.

data.title: Major Crypto Trader Shifts Positions, Opens New Longs in BTC, ETH, and SOL
data.description:
Onchain Lens posted on X that a significant cryptocurrency trader, known as '255 $BTC Sold,' has recently closed its short positions in Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Solana (SOL). The trader has now switched to long positions, acquiring 67,425.6 ETH valued at $204.6 million, 968.1 BTC worth $87 million, and 527,399.75 SOL totaling $69 million.

In addition to these changes, the trader has increased its short position in Dash (DASH) to 106,663 DASH, amounting to $7 million. This adjustment has resulted in a floating profit of $7 million for the trader.

data.title: U.S. Completes Formal Withdrawal from WHO After One-Year Notice Period
data.description:
On January 22, it was reported that U.S. President Donald Trump signed an executive order last year on January 20, announcing the United States' withdrawal from the World Health Organization (WHO). According to PANews, the United Nations received this notification on January 22 of the same year. As per WHO regulations, a member state can formally exit one year after submitting a withdrawal request. Today marks one year since the U.S. submitted its application to leave the WHO, signifying its official procedural withdrawal.

WHO spokesperson Lindmeier recently stated that the U.S. has the right to withdraw, provided it settles all outstanding membership dues. Currently, the U.S. has not paid its contributions for 2024 and 2025, totaling approximately $260 million.

data.title: XRP Enters 'Extreme Fear' Zone Amid Market Cap Decline
data.description: Santiment posted on X that XRP has entered 'Extreme Fear' territory according to social data analysis. This sentiment shift comes as small retail traders express pessimism following a 19% decline since its peak on January 5th. Historically, such high levels of bearish commentary have often preceded rallies, with prices frequently moving contrary to retail traders' expectations.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a net inflow of $7.16 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, XRP spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $7.16 million yesterday (January 21st, Eastern Time). The XRP spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday (January 21st, Eastern Time) was the Bitwise XRP ETF (XRP), with a single-day net inflow of $5.26 million and a historical total net inflow of $316 million. This was followed by the Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ), with a single-day net inflow of $1.06 million and a historical total net inflow of $291 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs was $1.39 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.16%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.23 billion.

data.title: Saga: SagaEVM experienced a security incident and has been suspended; approximately $7 million in assets were transferred to the Ethereum mainnet.
data.description: Saga issued an announcement stating that a security incident occurred on SagaEVM on January 21st. The chain has been suspended at block height 6,593,800, and an investigation and mitigation effort is underway. Saga stated that the incident involved a series of contract deployments, cross-chain operations, and subsequent liquidity transfers. For security reasons, the team will maintain the SagaEVM suspension until the investigation and mitigation measures are complete. Current priorities include: preventing further impact, verifying the scope of impact through archived data and execution traces, hardening relevant components before restarting, and only disclosing confirmed facts. Regarding the scope of impact, the affected entities are the SagaEVM chainlet and its components Colt and Mustang; unaffected entities include the Saga SSC mainnet, Saga protocol consensus, validator security, and other Saga chainlets. The announcement also stated that approximately $7 million worth of USDC, yUSD, ETH, and tBTC were transferred to the Ethereum mainnet. The attacking address has been identified, and Saga is working with exchanges and cross-chain bridges to blacklist the address and attempt to recover the assets. Saga emphasizes that there was no consensus failure, validator compromise, or signature key leakage in this incident, and the overall Saga network structure remains secure. The team will release a full technical recap report after confirming the root cause, fixing and hardening the affected components.

data.title: Argentine fintech company Pomelo has raised $55 million in Series C funding, led by investors including Kaszek.
data.description: Argentine fintech company Pomelo announced the completion of a $55 million Series C funding round. The round was led by Kaszek and Insight Partners, with participation from Index Ventures, Adams Street Partners, S32, Endeavor Catalyst, Monashees, and TQ Ventures. Pomelo stated that the funds will primarily be used to expand its credit processing operations in its two core markets of Mexico and Brazil, and to support the launch of a credit card product denominated in a global stablecoin. (Bloomberg)

data.title: River briefly broke through 45 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of nearly 30%.
data.description: According to GMGN data, River briefly broke through 45 USDT and is currently trading at 46.14 USDT, a 24-hour increase of 29.81%. Previously, it was reported that Justin Sun invested $8 million in River to support its deployment of chain-abstract stablecoin infrastructure within the TRON ecosystem.

data.title: U.S. Stock Markets See Significant Gains
data.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average closed with a rise of 588.64 points, or 1.21%, reaching 49,077.23 points on January 21. According to ChainCatcher, the S&P 500 Index increased by 78.76 points, or 1.16%, closing at 6,875.62 points. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq Composite Index gained 270.5 points, or 1.18%, ending at 23,224.82 points.

data.title: Eric Balchunas Questions US Equity Bears' Perspective
data.description: Eric Balchunas, senior ETF Analyst at Bloomberg Intelligence, posted on X questioning the rationale behind the pessimistic outlook of U.S. equity bears. He expressed confusion over their negative stance towards American equities, suggesting that their perspective might not align with the current market conditions. Balchunas implied that while everyone is entitled to their own opinion, the bearish sentiment towards U.S. equities seems unfounded given the prevailing economic indicators.
